indicators.name: staircase
indicators.rationale: The staircase is a prominent feature that suggests movement and activity, which is incompatible with a sleep environment.

indicators.name: high ceiling
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can contribute to noise and drafts, which are detrimental to sleep.

indicators.name: indoor lighting
indicators.rationale: Indoor lighting can be bright and disruptive, especially if it is not dimmable.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not well-suited for primary sleep. The presence of a staircase, high ceiling, and indoor lighting make it an unsuitable environment for restful sleep.
